title: tomanthea obtusifolia
intro: Tomanthea obtusifolia, also known as the "Yellow Mikan" or "Yellow Citrus", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. Tomanthea obtusifolia is believed to possess medicinal properties, with its bark and leaves being traditionally used in herbal remedies. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
